title: Add gating tasks
body:
to protect against regressions, we need to add a few gating tasks:
 * build with varlink
 * build podman-remote
 * build podman-remote-darwin

we already have a gating task for building without varlink

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

Why do we need varlink build? Everything else we do uses the varlink tag, including build_each_commit

Other two LGTM

> Why do we need varlink build? Everything else we do uses the varlink tag, including build_each_commit
> 
> Other two LGTM

if we are going to claim this is a gating task, we should build targets before all the other vms fire and figure it out after the fact.
Our buildah vendor would appear to be in bad shape
@mheon, working on updating the Buildah vendor.
@TomSweeneyRedHat thanks. I did a quick check but it didn't update cleanly.
yeah, it will be a beast mheon, needs updated imagebuilder and docker/docker too.
CI should be fixed, rebase please
